nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘Behold, I am going to break the bow of Elam, The finest of their might.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts: “Behold, I will break the bow of Elam, the mainstay of their might.

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說： 看哪！我要折斷以攔的弓， 就是他們戰鬥力強的武器。

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说：“看啊，我要摧毁以拦的弓箭手——他们的精锐之师。
